purpose: Core HRIS functionality — storing and managing employee personal and employment records
data_categories: Name, DOB, national ID, contact info, emergency contacts, employment details
notes: Primary platform function. Data processed strictly per client instructions.

purpose: Salary calculation, tax withholding, payslip generation
data_categories: Salary, bank account details, tax codes, pension contributions, bonus payments
notes: Payroll calculations performed per client-configured rules.

purpose: Long-term retention of employment records for regulatory compliance
data_categories: Full employment history, compensation records, disciplinary records, termination details
data_subjects: Current and former employees of client organizations
notes: Retention per EU employment record-keeping requirements. Former employee data archived but accessible.

purpose: Facilitating performance review cycles including manager ratings, peer reviews, and self-assessments
data_categories: Manager ratings, peer review scores, self-assessment responses, goal completion, development plans
notes: Review cycles configured by client HR admins.

purpose: Voluntary wellness survey collecting self-reported wellbeing metrics
legal_basis: Consent (collected by Meridian directly from employees)
data_categories: Stress levels, work-life balance scores, job satisfaction ratings, mental health indicators (self-reported)
notes: Meridian collects consent directly from employees via in-platform prompt. Consent form branded as Meridian HR. Results shared with employer as aggregated department-level reports only. Individual responses not shared with employer.

purpose: Generating workforce performance analytics for employer client dashboards
data_categories: Manager ratings, peer review scores, goal completion rates, training module completion, time-to-complete assessments
notes: Reports aggregated at department level (minimum 5 employees). Aggregation threshold waived for executive-level employees per client request — individual-level reports provided for C-suite. 23 of 187 client organizations have requested executive-level individual reporting.

purpose: Cross-client workforce benchmarking for Meridian product improvement and market research
data_categories: Anonymized compensation ranges, turnover rates, engagement scores, demographic distributions, training completion rates — derived from client employee data
data_subjects: Anonymized profiles derived from employees of all client organizations
notes: Aggregated data derived from client employee records — Meridian acts as independent controller for this processing. Anonymization performed before export to Snowflake. Anonymization method: suppression of direct identifiers + generalization of quasi-identifiers. Not formally validated against re-identification risk. Used for Meridian benchmarking reports sold to clients as add-on product.

purpose: Health insurance enrollment, retirement plan management, beneficiary tracking
data_categories: Health plan selections, dependent information, beneficiary designations, disability status
notes: Special category data (health). Additional safeguards applied.

purpose: Tracking website visitor behavior for marketing optimization
data_categories: IP address, pages viewed, session duration, referral source, device type

purpose: Managing sales pipeline and prospect relationships
data_categories: Name, email, company, job title, phone, meeting notes, proposal history
notes: HubSpot integration syncs with website forms and email campaigns.

purpose: Marketing campaigns and product update newsletters
notes: Opt-in only. Unsubscribe mechanism in every email.

purpose: Support ticket management for client administrators
data_categories: Name, email, phone, ticket content, platform screenshots
notes: Support for client HR admins only. Employee-level support directed to client HR.
